meta.prompt: Initial creation — layer-stack architecture view for documentation workspace

layers.label: Foundation — Baked In
layers.description: Core primitives every Sentinel gets automatically. These are code, not recipes — they ship inside packages/core.

items.name: Signal Envelope
items.description: The atomic unit of telemetry. Common outer contract (id, ts, machine, sentinel_id, kind, name, severity, attributes) with a typed collector-specific payload. OTel-aligned.

items.name: SignalBus
items.description: Internal pub/sub. Collectors emit signals; stores and transports subscribe. They never couple directly to each other.

items.name: Lifecycle
items.description: Handles SIGINT/SIGTERM (graceful shutdown), SIGHUP (config reload), and health snapshots.

items.name: ConfigLoader
items.description: Hierarchical config: built-in defaults → config file → env vars. Zod-validated. Reloadable on SIGHUP.

items.name: AtomicWrite
items.description: Temp-file + rename pattern. Crash-safe flat-file writes.

items.name: SerialQueue
items.description: Promise-chain serialisation. Non-blocking to callers; guarantees ordered I/O.

items.name: Logger
items.description: Pre-configured Pino. Structured, child-logger support, env-driven level.

layers.label: Collect — Boundary Umbrella 1
layers.description: Read data from outside. Inbound only. Recipes pulled in at install time — core ships none of these.

items.name: poll-command
items.description: Run a local command on a pulse interval.

items.name: poll-http
items.description: HTTP GET on a pulse interval.

items.name: orchestrator-ssh
items.description: SSH multi-host poll via bash-over-stdin. Zero remote footprint.

items.name: sql-diff-collector
items.description: Poll DB by updated_at watermark. Write changed records to local JSONL mirror. (New — not yet in spec §7.1.)

items.name: watch-directory
items.description: File system events via chokidar.

items.name: watch-logfile
items.description: Tail a log file.

items.name: hook-receiver
items.description: Inbound webhook listener.

items.name: subprocess-wrap
items.description: Supervised long-running subprocess.

items.name: snapshot-capture
items.description: Combine signals into a structured point-in-time snapshot.

layers.label: Internal — Storage & Enrichment
layers.description: How the Sentinel stores and enriches data between collect and expose/deliver. File-based is the default.

items.name: jsonl-store
items.description: Append-only JSONL + index JSON. Default for event streams.

items.name: snapshot-store
items.description: Single overwriting JSON via atomic-write. Default for point-in-time state (e.g. fleet snapshot).

items.name: memory-buffer
items.description: Ephemeral ring buffer. No persistence.

items.name: sqlite-store
items.description: Non-default. Must earn its place — schema migrations and multi-machine sync are fragile.

items.name: event-normaliser
items.description: Canonical Signal envelope + payload normalisation.

items.name: classifier (tiers 1–3)
items.description: Rules-based → regex/heuristic → LLM semantic enrichment.

layers.label: Expose — Boundary Umbrella 2
layers.description: Let the outside world read what the Sentinel knows. Follows Anthropic's API / CLI / MCP framework. Mature Sentinels ship all three.

items.name: api-expose
items.description: HTTP REST via Hono. Foundation — enables browser clients and non-agent consumers.

items.name: cli-expose
items.description: Pipe-friendly CLI interface. Local dev composition, on-machine agent loops.

items.name: mcp-expose
items.description: MCP server. Native surface for AI agent consumers.

layers.label: Deliver — Boundary Umbrella 3
layers.description: Push data outward to downstream systems. Outbound only.

items.name: http-push
items.description: Batched HTTP push with retry and backoff.

items.name: file-relay
items.description: rsync / Syncthing / network mount.

items.name: supabase-push
items.description: Push to Supabase.

items.name: otlp-push
items.description: Translate Signal → OTLP and push to an OTel collector.

items.name: socketio-emit
items.description: Push to a remote Socket.io server. Deliver role only — Socket.io expose is a Viewer concern.

layers.label: Operational — Runtime Supervisors
layers.description: How the Sentinel runs as a managed process on the host machine.

items.name: register-as-launchd
items.description: macOS launchd plist.

items.name: register-as-systemd
items.description: Linux systemd unit.

items.name: register-as-pm2
items.description: PM2 process.

items.name: register-as-docker
items.description: Docker container.
